Therefore, this paper proposes a lightweight seamless lane-level positioning method for smartphones with the integration of PPP and VINS based on BeiDou navigation satellite system (BDS-3) PPP-B2b services.
When structures like bridges or highway toll booths are recognized, the factor graph algorithm combines PPP-B2b/VINS to achieve positioning.
